title: Munto Codru Spaceport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Munto_Codru_Starport.png|thumb|right|200px|Munto Codru Spaceport]]

'''Munto Codru Spaceport''' was the primary [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of the remote [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Crystal Star]]'' {{1st}}
